headline: Morgan Stanley Reinstates Equal-Weight on Global Payments, Announces $65 Price Target
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst James Faucette   reinstates Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) with a Equal-Weight and announces $65 price target.
